inspection_summary: Added bounded Upbit PAPER runtime recovery guard for latest cycle recoverability, canonical JSONL quarantine, and orphan temp-file blocking.

hidden_defects.condition: bounded PAPER loop had PASS cycles but no explicit resume guard for partial write/orphan tmp/latest cycle recoverability
hidden_defects.impact: operator could misread bounded loop output as safely resumable after interrupted write
hidden_defects.fix: added recovery guard schema/runtime/validator/tests and loop report binding
